overall.description: Nighttime driving gameplay footage from a vehicle-mounted perspective, traveling from a highway bridge through suburban streets to a marina area. The scene features artificial street lighting, moderate traffic including cars and trucks, and transitions from urban infrastructure to waterfront docks with boats.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an elevated highway bridge at night, passing under a green Route 13 highway sign. The camera captures the cable-stayed bridge tower on the right and a concrete barrier. The vehicle takes a curving exit ramp to the right, approaching a silver box truck ahead.

agents.ego_description: stopped behind a truck at a stop sign, then turning right onto a new road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops behind a box truck at a stop sign at the end of the exit ramp. After the truck turns right, the vehicle follows, making a right turn onto a tree-lined road. A white sports car is visible waiting on the cross street.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a winding road densely lined with trees on both sides, following a dark sedan. A metal guardrail runs along the right side, and illuminated billboards appear in the distance. A white van passes by on the left.

events.description: transitioning from forested road to palm-tree lined suburban street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
low-rise commercial building with lit windows on the right

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a suburban street lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. The vehicle follows a white coupe, passing parked cars and street lights. The environment shifts from dense forest to open suburban development as the vehicle approaches a stop sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: marina approach with waterfront and boat storage

entering marina district with boats visible on trailers

agents.ego_description: turning right at the stop sign and driving toward the marina waterfront

wooden marina docks with boats moored alongside
boats parked on trailers along the right side of the road
painted white crosswalk lines on the road surface

segments.scene_description: After stopping at the stop sign, the vehicle turns right toward the waterfront. The scene opens up to reveal a marina area with boats on trailers parked along the right side and docked boats visible to the left. A large suspension bridge tower appears in the distance as the vehicle drives over a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront marina road with boat storage and industrial buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving along the waterfront marina road, passing industrial warehouse buildings on the left and boats on trailers on the right. Sailboat masts are visible against the night sky, and distant city lights twinkle across the water. The road stretches ahead with utility poles lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime drive that transitions from an elevated highway bridge into a tree-lined suburban corridor and finally opens onto a waterfront marina. It begins by gliding along a cable-stayed bridge under a green highway sign before curving down an exit ramp to stop behind a silver box truck. As the vehicle turns onto a winding road, the environment shifts into a dense canopy of trees with metal guardrails and distant billboards, eventually opening up into a suburban street lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. The scene then turns toward the coast, where the road expands to reveal a marina filled with boats on trailers and docked vessels under the silhouette of a distant suspension bridge. Finally, the camera moves past industrial warehouses and sailboat masts, following a road lined with utility poles toward twinkling city lights across the water.
